title: Status' In One Column Counting Towards Progress
excerpt: For example, I would like to see a Working on it Status be able to add up to 50% or 25% and then when they change to Done it hits 100%.

posts.author: cbacon (Caleb Bacon)
posts.cookedHtml: For example, I would like to see a Working on it Status be able to add up to 50% or 25% and then when they change to Done it hits 100%.
